title: Katana Texture (x16 - x32 - x64)
body:
# **

Katana Texture

**

Transforming Swords in Elegant Katanas

This texture pack brings an exciting new dimension to your gaming experience by transforming boring classic swords into magnificent katanas crafted from the same minerals you already know.

## **

Themed Katanas:

**

Forget the usual generic swords.

## **

Variety of Minerals:

**

From shimmering Diamond katanas to robust stone katanas, you will find all the minerals represented in this pack.

##

Quality: ###
-16 pixels
-32 pixels
-64 pixels
